question_text: Weight of a person can be expressed as a function of their age. The function usually varies from person to person. Suppose this function is identical for two brothers,

options.A: nd it monotonically increases till the age of 50 years and then it monotonically
options.D: ecreases. Let 𝑎1 and 𝑎2 (in years) denote the ages of the brothers and 𝑎1 < 𝑎2. Which one of the following statements is correct about their age on the day when they attain the same weight?
